description: Letter fragment from Daniel b. Azarya to a man in Fustat. Daniel b. Azarya shows his joy that the man recovered from his illness. Daniel b. Azarya describes how he prayed for his recovery in front of Temple Mount and David's tomb. He mentions that he knows about his recovery from a letter he received from Yefet b. David. VMR
tags: Illness, illness: recovery, illness letter 969-1517, Daniel b. Azarya
description_he: שבר מכתב מדניאל בן עזריה לאיש בפוסטאט. שמח על החלמת הנמען. מספר שהתפלל לרפואתו בפני הר הבית וקבר דוד.
